isi.lyrics:
Lyric Kim Min Wool - 혼자, 이별 (Alone, Apart)

Romanization

haruui kkeuteseo gyeou sumeul goreul ttae
mundeuk neoui saenggagi nanda
ulkeok geuriumi tto millyeo deureowa
teong bin banganen ajik namanna bwa
maeil geuriwojyeo mamsoge salgo inna bwa
eonjengga neoreul ijeul su isseulkka
neol geurida deo geurida geuriwohada
eogimeopsi tto honjaseo ibyeolhaeyagetji
eoneusae neoreul tto geuryeoboda chamatdeon hansumman
yeojeonhi kkeutnaji ana nae seulpeun ibyeoreun
dasi naeiri omyeon modeun ge jejariro dorawa
naege saranghanda malhae julkka
neol geurida deo geurida geuriwohada
eogimeopsi tto honjaseo ibyeolhaeyagetji
eoneusae neoreul tto geuryeoboda chamatdeon hansumman
yeojeonhi kkeutnaji anneun nae seulpeun ibyeoreun
jal jinaego isseulkka dasin bol su eopseulkka
eotteoge haeya nega dorawa julkka
neol jiuda neol jiuda neol jiudaga
gyeolguge nan tto neoraseo eojjeol suga eomna bwa
eoneusae geuriumi jaraseo bonael su eopjana
yeojeonhi kkeutnaji anneun honjamanui ibyeoreun

Hangeul

하루의 끝에서 겨우 숨을 고를 때
문득 너의 생각이 난다
울컥 그리움이 또 밀려 들어와
텅 빈 방안엔 아직 남았나 봐
매일 그리워져 맘속에 살고 있나 봐
언젠가 너를 잊을 수 있을까
널 그리다 더 그리다 그리워하다
어김없이 또 혼자서 이별해야겠지
어느새 너를 또 그려보다 참았던 한숨만
여전히 끝나지 않아 내 슬픈 이별은
다시 내일이 오면 모든 게 제자리로 돌아와
내게 사랑한다 말해 줄까
널 그리다 더 그리다 그리워하다
어김없이 또 혼자서 이별해야겠지
어느새 너를 또 그려보다 참았던 한숨만
여전히 끝나지 않는 내 슬픈 이별은
잘 지내고 있을까 다신 볼 수 없을까
어떻게 해야 네가 돌아와 줄까
널 지우다 널 지우다 널 지우다가
결국에 난 또 너라서 어쩔 수가 없나 봐
어느새 그리움이 자라서 보낼 수 없잖아
여전히 끝나지 않는 혼자만의 이별은

isi.lyrics:
Lyric JayBrown - 내 마음은 커피 (Coffee and a Daisy)

Romanization

sarangi anin juldo moreugo
neoege neomu mani jwobeoryeonne
neoege keopireul jwodo neon hwaljjak useojwosseo

nega jun geon sarangieosseo wanjeon
eorisukhan saramieosseo naneun
ije waseo almyeon mwo hagesseo

saranghaeraneun malloneun jeoldaero
hyungnae nael su eopseo neoui sarangeul

nae maeumeun keopi
kkochege keopi june
geureoni nega apeuji
hyanggiroun geon gatne

nae maeumeun keopi
kkochege keopi june
geureoni nega apeuji
hyanggiroun geon gatne

hwabune muri neomu manaseo neomchyeoheureun geoyeonna
hoksi naui jinsimi damgin maeume chehan geolkka

igijeogin mameuro neoui mameul wonhago
neoui ppyame heureuneun mulbangureul bogodo nan
neoreul saranghae

nae maeumeun keopi (neoege)
kkochege keopi june (jwobeoryeonne)
geureoni nega apeuji (huh)
hyanggiroun geon gatne (gatne)

sarangi anieonne (anirago)
sarangi ra mideonneunde (mideonneunde)
igijeogin geoyeosseo (naega)
sarangi anieosseo (mianhae)

nega jun geon sarangigo naega jun geon mwoyeosseulkka
nega jun geon jinsimigo naega jun geon jinsimilkka
nega jun geon sarangigo naega jun geon mwoyeosseulkka
nega jun geon jinsimigo naega jun geon

Hangeul

사랑이 아닌 줄도 모르고
너에게 너무 많이 줘버렸네
너에게 커피를 줘도 넌 활짝 웃어줬어

네가 준 건 사랑이었어 완전
어리숙한 사람이었어 나는
이제 와서 알면 뭐 하겠어

사랑해라는 말로는 절대로
흉내 낼 수 없어 너의 사랑을

내 마음은 커피
꽃에게 커피 주네
그러니 네가 아프지
향기로운 건 같네

내 마음은 커피
꽃에게 커피 주네
그러니 네가 아프지
향기로운 건 같네

화분에 물이 너무 많아서 넘쳐흐른 거였나
혹시 나의 진심이 담긴 마음에 체한 걸까

이기적인 맘으로 너의 맘을 원하고
너의 뺨에 흐르는 물방울을 보고도 난
너를 사랑해

내 마음은 커피 (너에게)
꽃에게 커피 주네 (줘버렸네)
그러니 네가 아프지 (huh)
향기로운 건 같네 (같네)

사랑이 아니었네 (아니라고)
사랑이 라 믿었는데 (믿었는데)
이기적인 거였어 (내가)
사랑이 아니었어 (미안해)

네가 준 건 사랑이고 내가 준 건 뭐였을까
네가 준 건 진심이고 내가 준 건 진심일까
네가 준 건 사랑이고 내가 준 건 뭐였을까
네가 준 건 진심이고 내가 준 건

did you really need a real knife ?
for the something about us
cause you told me it’s a real nice
I just took it away
what if I knew the reason
why I was blinded
shining deer let me know
what I was looking for

maybe I want to
I want to face them all
baby, I’m used to
being next to anyone
I don’t know what to feel
in this music

sometimes
I don’t care about a hole in my sock
every part of me itself just looks right
all those good things I’ve been watching went over my head

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Anthony Baker - Late Night Street

Romanization

Boulevard of neon signs
A bitter city chronicle
No one's callin' for me
Just a song that's in the air

I kinda love this feeling,
So I just keep on walkin'
I ain't got nowhere to go (Nowhere to go)

Breathe it in so deep
This heavy midnight haze
Lock myself inside and throw the key
I don't wanna leave

Flashing neon lights...
(In this) glow, I'm who I'm meant to be
Nothin' left to hide, you see these streets belong to me

Late night street I'm hanging on a
Places (I've)been don't call an uber
Walk those beats amudo eopsi
Stroll down these street till I die

Late night street I'm walking on a
Places (I've)been don't call an uber
Slave to the beat that's all I need here
Stroll down this street till I die

Coloured streamers bleedin' light
Dancin' in this chilly night,
Burnin' with a slow fire seein' visions in the night

Faces I ain't never seen
Fillin' up the spaces,
Showin' me what could have been

Can you even tell me who you really are?
'Cause we been dyin' since we made it
(naeilman bomyeo saljin ankil)
You don't really wanna say
Just let you fade away, just fade away
To those late night streets

Don't ask me what I want
I'm just wandering streets
i georie chwihae
jantteuk biteulgeorine

Isn't it just like us
urideurui bameun yeongwonhalkkeoya
Until those streetlights sink deep into the night

Late night street I'm hanging on a
Places (I've)been don't call an uber
Walk those beats amudo eopsi
Stroll down these street till I die

Places (I've)been don't call an uber
Slave to the beat that's all I need here
Stroll down this street till I die

Hangeul

Boulevard of neon signs
A bitter city chronicle
No one's callin' for me
Just a song that's in the air

I kinda love this feeling,
So I just keep on walkin'
I ain't got nowhere to go (Nowhere to go)

Breathe it in so deep
This heavy midnight haze
Lock myself inside and throw the key
I don't wanna leave

(In this) glow, I'm who I'm meant to be

Coloured streamers bleedin' light

Fillin' up the spaces,
Showin' me what could have been

Can you even tell me who you really are?
'Cause we been dyin' since we made it
(내일만 보며 살진 않길)
You don't really wanna say
Just let you fade away, just fade away
To those late night streets

Don't ask me what I want
I'm just wandering streets
이 거리에 취해

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Anthony Baker - Almost Everything

Romanization

The sunset felt everlasting.
Even as the sun goes down and sparkling lights illuminate the streets,
Your sunset stays timeless.
For those who share meals and express gratitude.

The fog was thickly shrouded.
They pushed their cheeks against one another and examined each other.
She yielded her arms to the happy tune.
They will be relieved yeongwonhan seogyang araeseo

Everything you want,
Everything you wish for,
Everything you dreaming above us,
Everything you felt was beautiful
Everything (you) went through
Everything you watch
I dare not to grieve or mourn with you
Almost everything

That reciting who throws up blankly,
They were exceptionally eoullineun mal
The groan of a wooden floor,
Even the faint sound of the old man's breath
Brings this cold dream to our endless life.

Everything you want,
Everything you thought that it was just a dream.
Become a sparkling lights and illuminate the streets
yeongwon irago hae
eoduwojindaedo
Filling every precious moment, seeping into you.

Everything you want,
Everything you wish for,
Everything you dreaming above us,
Everything you felt was beautiful.
Everything (you) went through
Everything you watch
I dare not to grieve or mourn with you
Almost everything
